title: 2024430Dry
summary:
Main
· Spot Dry Bulk Rates Continue to Underperform Although Expectations Remain High - The month of April proved to be a disappointment for freight futures traders as earlier expectations for a rebound in rates failed to materialize. In fact, the average spot Capesize rate for the month ended up being some 40% lower than what was anticipated just a month prior, reflecting the significant optimism in the dry bulk industry on the future progression of dry bulk rates. It is difficult to pinpoint a specific reason for such underperformance versus expectations, but the freight futures market is known for extrapolating past trends to the future, something that we feel is unwise for such a cyclical industry.
